generated_oml:
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design (CAD) representations of physical components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance DifferentialEquationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations describing dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes models and sensor data to monitor system safety and performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Uses models to generate optimal control actions"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Estimates system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Detects faults in the system using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides supervisory control actions based on system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares solver for parameter optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance SimulationPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of physical twin behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetected, SystemPerformanceInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection in the system"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation of the system"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimated
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization for control actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control actions for system adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlAction
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterOptimized
]

instance PredictiveSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation reproducing and forecasting Physical Twin behavior"
]

instance SafetyViolationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System safety violation detected by monitoring"
]

instance SystemPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System performance metrics for optimal operation"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detected in system components"
]

instance SystemStateEstimated : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of the system from sensor data"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal control action generated for system adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SupervisoryControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Supervisory control action to adjust physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModelParameterOptimized : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model parameters optimized using calibration algorithms"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Changes to the Physical Twin may be made when violations are detected, as decided by humans or algorithms. However, specific details on command types, control message formats, validation and authentication mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture includes a controller, low-level driver, and RabbitMQ communication server for data delivery and synchronization, where calibration algorithms update model parameters using sensor data and monitors validate system performance for safety and optimality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained via calibration algorithms updating parameters with best estimates from sensor data, while validity is ensured through continuous monitoring of system performance against safety and optimality thresholds; detected violations trigger corrective actions by humans or algorithms."
]
